The Waymo AV slowed and continued past the intersection with Cranston Road and continued onto the US-101 South on-ramp at Merchant Road. The Waymo AV came to a stop at the stop sign at the entrance to US-101 South and then proceeded approximately 30 meters in the right-most lane of US-101 South and came to a stop in a location with no right-hand shoulder. The SUV came to a stop and remained stopped in the lane to the left of the Waymo AV. The passenger of the Waymo AV exited the vehicle after the collision. The Waymo AV proceeded on US-101 South in autonomous mode.
